---
title: "Student Analysis Script Documentation"
author: "Nahom Kifle"
date: "2026"
output: html_document
---

# Purpose

This R Markdown document explains the purpose and workflow of the student performance analysis script. The script demonstrates a simple data analysis process using synthetic student performance data.

# Inputs

The script uses a synthetic dataset containing:

- Student IDs
- Attendance percentages
- Assignment grades
- Final exam scores

# Outputs

The script produces:

- Summary statistics
- Average grade calculations
- Basic visualizations of student performance trends

# Required Libraries

```r
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
```

# Example Code

```r
# Load dataset
student_data <- read.csv("students.csv")

# View summary statistics
summary(student_data)

# Calculate average grade
mean(student_data$Final_Grade)
```

# Visualization Example

```r
ggplot(student_data, aes(x = Attendance, y = Final_Grade)) +
  geom_point() +
  ggtitle("Attendance vs Final Grade")
```

# Notes

This project uses synthetic data for educational purposes only. The documentation was reviewed and formatted using AI-assisted Markdown refinement workflows.
